mapper.sql: uq.id, uq.user_id, uq.question_id, uq.is_correct, uq.is_wrong_book, uq.user_answer, uq.attempt_count, uq.create_time, uq.update_time, q.question_type, q.question, q.options, q.answer, q.analysis, q.difficulty
mapper.select: SELECT FROM t_user_question uq LEFT JOIN t_question q ON uq.question_id = q.id WHERE uq.id = #{id}
SELECT FROM t_user_question uq LEFT JOIN t_question q ON uq.question_id = q.id WHERE uq.user_id = #{userId} AND uq.question_id = #{questionId}
SELECT FROM t_user_question uq LEFT JOIN t_question q ON uq.question_id = q.id WHERE uq.user_id = #{userId} AND uq.is_wrong_book = 1 ORDER BY uq.update_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_user_question (user_id, question_id, is_correct, is_wrong_book, user_answer, attempt_count) VALUES (#{userId}, #{questionId}, #{isCorrect}, #{isWrongBook}, #{userAnswer}, #{attemptCount})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM t_user_question WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_wrong_book = 1
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user_question WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_wrong_book = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_user_question WHERE user_id = #{userId}
